title: Blue Prime Theme Blueberry Vanilla Cake
imageAlt: Blue Prime Theme Blueberry Vanilla Cake
description: Bold and vibrant Prime-themed cake featuring bright blue buttercream, detailed drink-bottle toppers, and a smooth fondant centre—perfect for fans of the trendy beverage.
ingredients: Blueberry sponge, vanilla sponge, vanilla buttercream, fondant decorations, themed bottle toppers
